<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Erde-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de terre]][[hak:Kí-sṳ]][[ja:己巳]][[ko:기사 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Snaak]][[vi:Kỷ Tỵ]][[za:Geijceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-sū]][[zh-yue:己巳]][[zh:己巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Erde-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de terre]][[hak:Kí-sṳ]][[ja:己巳]][[ko:기사 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Snaak]][[vi:Kỷ Tỵ]][[za:Geijceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-sū]][[zh-yue:己巳]][[zh:己巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Erde-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de terre]][[hak:Kí-sṳ]][[ja:己巳]][[ko:기사 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Snaak]][[vi:Kỷ Tỵ]][[za:Geijceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-sū]][[zh-yue:己巳]][[zh:己巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Snake|kanji=己巳|romaji=tsuchinoto mi|onyomi=ki shi|p=jǐsì|w=chi-ssu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ sɨ²¹|y=gei2 si6|j=gei2 si6|ci=kei siː²|mc=kɨj si|oc-bs=kɯʔ slɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Snake also known as 己巳''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire gives rise to Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Snake (己巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kishi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (기사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Tỵ

<!--
==
* Yin Earth Snake (己巳) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのとみ (tsuchi-no-to-mi)
***Onyomi: きどのみ (kido-no-mi)
***Onyomi: きし (kishi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gisa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Tỵ

-->
==Years of Yin Earth Snake==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 9 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Earth Snake (己巳)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|9 AD|ja|9年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/9|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=9 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=AD 9|WD=Q23339}}
* {{ill|AD 69|en|AD 69|WD=Q30203|lt=69 AD|1=AD 69}}
* {{ill|AD 129|en|AD 129|WD=Q30298|lt=129 AD|1=AD 129}}
* {{ill|189|en|189|WD=Q33053|lt=189 AD|1=189}}
* {{ill|249|en|249|WD=Q32624|lt=249 AD|1=249}}
* {{ill|309|en|309|WD=Q32270|lt=309 AD|1=309}}
* {{ill|369|en|369|WD=Q48007|lt=369 AD|1=369}}
* {{ill|429|en|429|WD=Q31195|lt=429 AD|1=429}}
* {{ill|489|en|489|WD=Q30080|lt=489 AD|1=489}}
* {{ill|549|en|549|WD=Q30907|lt=549 AD|1=549}}
* {{ill|609|en|609|WD=Q30897|lt=609 AD|1=609}}
* {{ill|669|en|669|WD=Q31115|lt=669 AD|1=669}}
* {{ill|729|en|729|WD=Q23561|lt=729 AD|1=729}}
* {{ill|789|en|789|WD=Q31558|lt=789 AD|1=789}}
* {{ill|849|en|849|WD=Q23902|lt=849 AD|1=849}}
* {{ill|909|en|909|WD=Q24775|lt=909 AD|1=909}}
* {{ill|969|en|969|WD=Q23708|lt=969 AD|1=969}}
|
* {{ill|1029|en|1029|WD=Q19274|lt=1029 AD|1=1029}}
* {{ill|1089|en|1089|WD=Q19465|lt=1089 AD|1=1089}}
* {{ill|1149|en|1149|WD=Q19638|lt=1149 AD|1=1149}}
* {{ill|1209|en|1209|WD=Q5249|lt=1209 AD|1=1209}}
* {{ill|1269|en|1269|WD=Q5521|lt=1269 AD|1=1269}}
* {{ill|1329|en|1329|WD=Q5894|lt=1329 AD|1=1329}}
* {{ill|1389|en|1389|WD=Q6371|lt=1389 AD|1=1389}}
* {{ill|1449|en|1449|WD=Q6446|lt=1449 AD|1=1449}}
* {{ill|1509|en|1509|WD=Q6177|lt=1509 AD|1=1509}}
* {{ill|1569|en|1569|WD=Q6653|lt=1569 AD|1=1569}}
* {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629 AD|1=1629}}
* {{ill|1689|en|1689|WD=Q7674|lt=1689 AD|1=1689}}
* {{ill|1749|en|1749|WD=Q7607|lt=1749 AD|1=1749}}
* {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809 AD|1=1809}}
* {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869 AD|1=1869}}
* {{ill|1929|en|1929|WD=Q18792|lt=1929 AD|1=1929}}
* {{ill|1989|en|1989|WD=Q2425|lt=1989 AD|1=1989}}
|
* {{ill|2049 AD|ja|2049年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2049|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2049 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2109 AD|ja|2109年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2109|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2109 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2100年代|1=2100s|WD=Q1209304}}
* {{ill|2169 AD|ja|2169年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2169|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2169 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2229 AD|ja|2229年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2229|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2229 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2289 AD|ja|2289年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2289|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2289 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2349 AD|ja|2349年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2349|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2349 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2409 AD|ja|2409年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2409|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2409 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2469 AD|ja|2469年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2469|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2469 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2529 AD|ja|2529年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2529|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2529 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2589 AD|ja|2589年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2589|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2589 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2649 AD|ja|2649年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2649|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2649 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2709 AD|ja|2709年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2709|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2709 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2769 AD|ja|2769年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2769|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2769 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2829 AD|ja|2829年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2829|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2829 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2889 AD|ja|2889年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2889|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2889 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2949 AD|ja|2949年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2949|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2949 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

===Events===
* {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|己巳紀行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by {{ill|Kaibara Ekken|en|Kaibara Ekken|WD=Q1721396|lt=Kaihara Ekken|1=Kaibara Ekken}} in {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term {{ill|Three Views of Japan|en|Three Views of Japan|WD=Q1144867|lt=Japan’s Three Views|1=Three Views of Japan}}. (As annotated in 『新日本古典文学大系』 by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|板坂耀子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=Yōko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Snake==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
===暦注下段===
* For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}.
* {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}
* {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|大明日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]]
[[zh-yue:己巳]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|version=98658365|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Earth Snake]]

[[ja:己巳]]
[[zh:己巳]]
[[ko:기사 (간지)]]
[[fr:Serpent de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Schlange]]

[[af:Aardeslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Earth Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de terreboishak]]
[[it:Ki-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Kỷ Tỵ]]
[[za:Keiceij]]
[[ar:Yin Earth Snake]]

<!--Yin Earth Snake--><!--Yin Earth Snake-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Kí-sṳ]]
[[nds:Eer-Snaak]]
[[za:Geijceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-sū]]
[[zh-yue:己巳]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Kí-sṳ]]
[[nds:Eer-Snaak]]
[[za:Geijceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-sū]]
[[zh-yue:己巳]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062039}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
